description: Browse a SharePoint site's lists and search content via the SharePoint REST API (_api), authenticated by the cookie of your open SharePoint tab — no token needed, just stay logged in. Configure one site per platform instance (add more for additional sites). Folder/page tools that need server-relative paths are omitted because IIS rejects encoded slashes; use list and search tools instead.

credentialFields.name: siteUrl
credentialFields.label: Site URL
credentialFields.description: Full URL of the SharePoint site, including the /sites/... path. Open it and stay logged in.

tools.name: sharepoint_get_web
tools.description: Get the current site's basic info (title, description, URL).

tools.name: sharepoint_get_lists
tools.description: List the lists and document libraries on the site.

tools.name: sharepoint_list_items
tools.description: Query items in a list or library by its display name (e.g. 'Documents', 'Tasks', 'Site Pages'). Use $select / $filter / $top to shape results.

params.name: list_name
params.description: List display name. Spaces are allowed.

tools.name: sharepoint_search
tools.description: Full-text search across the site collection. Pass keywords in querytext.

params.name: querytext
params.description: Search keywords, wrapped in single quotes by SharePoint automatically — pass plain text like 'quarterly report'.
